1.gl: properly, to glitter from afar, i.e. to be eminent (as a superintendent, especially of the Temple services and its music); to be permanent
1.kj: excel, chief musician (singer), oversee(-r), set forward.
1.dv: a primitive root;  also as denominative from H5331 (נֶצַח)

1.gl: 'Thou must not destroy'; probably the opening words to a popular song
David, the youngest son of Jesse
1.dv: rarely (fully); דָּוִיד; from the same as H1730 (דּוֹד); loving;

2.gl: a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship, including grandson, subject, nation, quality or condition, etc., (like father or brother), etc.)
2.kj: [phrase] afflicted, age, (Ahoh-) (Ammon-) (Hachmon-) (Lev-) ite, (anoint-) ed one, appointed to, ([phrase]) arrow, (Assyr-) (Babylon-) (Egypt-) (Grec-) ian, one born, bough, branch

2.gl: perhaps properly, to arrange; but used figuratively (of words), to speak; rarely (in a destructive sense) to subdue
2.kj: answer, appoint, bid, command, commune, declare, destroy, give, name, promise, pronounce, rehearse, say, speak, be spokesman, subdue, talk, teach, tell, think, use (entreaties), ut

2.gl: to judge, i.e. pronounce sentence (for or against); by implication, to vindicate or punish; by extenssion, to govern; passively, to litigate (literally or figuratively)
2.kj: [phrase] avenge, [idiom] that condemn, contend, defend, execute (judgment), (be a) judge(-ment), [idiom] needs, plead, reason, rule.

2.gl: evenness, i.e. (figuratively) prosperity or concord; also straightness, i.e. (figuratively) rectitude (only in plural with singular sense; often adverbially)
2.kj: agreement, aright, that are equal, equity, (things that are) right(-eously, things), sweetly, upright(-ly, -ness).

2.gl: the right (natural, moral or legal); also (abstractly) equity or (figuratively) prosperity
2.kj: [idiom] even, ([idiom] that which is altogether) just(-ice), (un-)right(-eous) (cause, -ly, -ness).

2.gl: ruddy i.e. a human being (an individual or the species, mankind, etc.)
2.kj: [idiom] another, [phrase] hypocrite, [phrase] common sort, [idiom] low, man (mean, of low degree), person.

3.gl: a hand (the open one (indicating power, means, direction, etc.),
3.kj: ([phrase] be) able, [idiom] about, [phrase] armholes, at, axletree, because of, beside, border, [idiom] bounty, [phrase] broad, (broken-) handed, [idiom] by, charge, coast, [phrase
3.dv: a primitive word; in distinction from H3709 (כַּף), the closed one); used (as noun, adverb, etc.) in a great variety of applications, both literally a

3.gl: the heart; also used (figuratively) very widely for the feelings, the will and even the intellect; likewise for the centre of anything
3.kj: [phrase] care for, comfortably, consent, [idiom] considered, courag(-eous), friend(-ly), ((broken-), (hard-), (merry-), (stiff-), (stout-), double) heart(-ed), [idiom] heed, [idiom

3.gl: meaning accession (used as an adverb or conjunction); also or yea; adversatively though
3.kj: also, [phrase] although, and (furthermore, yet), but, even, [phrase] how much less (more, rather than), moreover, with, yea.

3.gl: violence; by implication, wrong; by meton. unjust gain
3.kj: cruel(-ty), damage, false, injustice, [idiom] oppressor, unrighteous, violence (against, done), violent (dealing), wrong.

3.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
3.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
3.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;
or עָוֶל; and (feminine) עַוְלָה; or עוֹלָה; or עֹלָה; from H5765 (עֲוַל);

4.gl: perhaps properly, to arrange; but used figuratively (of words), to speak; rarely (in a destructive sense) to subdue
4.kj: answer, appoint, bid, command, commune, declare, destroy, give, name, promise, pronounce, rehearse, say, speak, be spokesman, subdue, talk, teach, tell, think, use (entreaties), ut

4.gl: to vacillate, i.e. reel or stray (literally or figuratively); also causative of both
4.kj: (cause to) go astray, deceive, dissemble, (cause to, make to) err, pant, seduce, (make to) stagger, (cause to) wander, be out of the way.

4.gl: to turn aside (especially for lodging); hence to be aforeigner, strange, profane; specifically (active participle) to commit adultery
4.kj: (come from) another (man, place), fanner, go away, (e-) strange(-r, thing, woman).

4.gl: the belly, especially the womb; also the bosom or body of anything
4.kj: belly, body, [phrase] as they be born, [phrase] within, womb.
4.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be hollow;

4.gl: morally wrong; concretely, an (actively) bad person
4.kj: [phrase] condemned, guilty, ungodly, wicked (man), that did wrong.
deceitful, false, leasing, + liar, lie, lying.

5.gl: heat; figuratively, anger, poison (from its fever)
5.kj: anger, bottles, hot displeasure, furious(-ly, -ry), heat, indignation, poison, rage, wrath(-ful). See H2529 (חֶמְאָה).

5.gl: broadness. i.e. (concrete) the ear (from its form in man)
5.kj: [phrase] advertise, audience, [phrase] displease, ear, hearing, [phrase] show.

5.gl: resemblance; concretely, model, shape; adverbially, like
to close (the lips or ears); by analology to contract (a window by bevelled jambs)

5.dv: from an unused root meaning to twist;

6.gl: to hear intelligently (often with implication of attention, obedience, etc.; causatively, to tell, etc.)
6.kj: [idiom] attentively, call (gather) together, [idiom] carefully, [idiom] certainly, consent, consider, be content, declare, [idiom] diligently, discern, give ear, (cause to, let, ma
[phrase] aloud, bleating, crackling, cry ([phrase] out), fame, lightness, lowing, noise, [phrase] hold peace, (pro-) claim, proclamation, [phrase] sing, sound, [phrase] spark, thun
6.dv: or קֹל; from an unused root meaning to call aloud;

6.gl: to join (literally or figuratively); specifically (by means of spells) to fascinate
6.kj: charm(-er), be compact, couple (together), have fellowship with, heap up, join (self, together), league.

6.gl: to be wise (in mind, word or act)
6.kj: [idiom] exceeding, teach wisdom, be (make self, shew self) wise, deal (never so) wisely, make wiser.

6.gl: to whisper; by implication, to mumble aspell (as a magician)

7.gl: the mouth (as the means of blowing), whether literal or figurative (particularly speech); specifically edge, portion or side; adverbially (with preposition) according to
7.kj: accord(-ing as, -ing to), after, appointment, assent, collar, command(-ment), [idiom] eat, edge, end, entry, [phrase] file, hole, [idiom] in, mind, mouth, part, portion, [idiom] (s

7.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
7.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

7.gl: to pull down or in pieces, break, destroy
7.kj: beat down, break (down, through), destroy, overthrow, pluck down, pull down, ruin, throw down, [idiom] utterly.

7.gl: a tooth (as sharp); specifically  ivory; figuratively, a cliff
a village (as covered in by walls); also a young lion (perhaps as covered with a mane)
Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
7.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

8.gl: to walk (in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively)
8.kj: (all) along, apace, behave (self), come, (on) continually, be conversant, depart, [phrase] be eased, enter, exercise (self), [phrase] follow, forth, forward, get, go (about, abroad
8.dv: akin to H3212 (יָלַךְ); a primitive root;

8.gl: properly, a piercer, i.e. an arrow; by implication, a wound; figuratively, (of God) thunderbolt; the shaft of aspear
8.kj: [phrase] archer, arrow, dart, shaft, staff, wound.
8.dv: from H2686 (חָצַץ); also by interchange for H6086 (עֵץ)

8.gl: to cut short, i.e. curtail (specifically the prepuce, i.e. to circumcise); by implication, to blunt; figuratively, to destroy
8.kj: circumcise(-ing), selves), cut down (in pieces), destroy, [idiom] must needs.
abhor, cast away (off), contemn, despise, disdain, (become) loathe(some), melt away, refuse, reject, reprobate, [idiom] utterly, vile person.

8.gl: to tread; by implication, to walk; also to string abow (by treading on it in bending)
8.kj: archer, bend, come, draw, go (over), guide, lead (forth), thresh, tread (down), walk.

8.gl: water; figuratively, juice; by euphemism, urine, semen
8.dv: dual of a primitive noun (but used in a singular sense);

9.gl: to walk (in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively)
9.kj: (all) along, apace, behave (self), come, (on) continually, be conversant, depart, [phrase] be eased, enter, exercise (self), [phrase] follow, forth, forward, get, go (about, abroad
9.dv: akin to H3212 (יָלַךְ); a primitive root;

9.kj: (adulter) ess, each, every, female, [idiom] many, [phrase] none, one, [phrase] together, wife, woman. Often unexpressed in English.
9.dv: feminine of H376 (אִישׁ) or H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ); irregular plural, נָשִׁים;(used in the same wide sense as H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ))

9.gl: the sun; by implication, the east; figuratively, a ray, i.e. (architectural) a notched battlement
9.kj: [phrase] east side(-ward), sun (rising), [phrase] west(-ward), window. See also H1053 (בֵּית שֶׁמֶשׁ).
9.dv: from an unused root meaning to be brilliant;

9.gl: properly, a failure; by implication nothing; usually (adverb) not at all; also lest
9.kj: lest, neither, no, none (that...), not (any), nothing.

9.gl: to gaze at; mentally to perceive, contemplate (with pleasure); specifically, to have avision of
a snail (as if floating in its own slime)

10.gl: alive; hence, raw (flesh); fresh (plant, water, year), strong; also (as noun, especially in the feminine singular and masculine plural) life (or living thing), whether literally or figuratively
10.kj: [phrase] age, alive, appetite, (wild) beast, company, congregation, life(-time), live(-ly), living (creature, thing), maintenance, [phrase] merry, multitude, [phrase] (be) old, qui

10.gl: to separate mentally (or distinguish), i.e.(generally) understand
10.kj: attend, consider, be cunning, diligently, direct, discern, eloquent, feel, inform, instruct, have intelligence, know, look well to, mark, perceive, be prudent, regard, (can) skill(

10.gl: a pot; also a thorn (as springing up rapidly); by implication, a hook
10.dv: or (feminine) סִירָה; or סִרָה; (Jeremiah 52:18), from a primitive root meaning to boil up;

10.gl: to storm; by implication, to shiver, i.e. fear
10.kj: be (horribly) afraid, fear, hurl as a storm, be tempestuous, come like (take away as with) a whirlwind.

10.gl: properly, non-occurrence; used adverbially, not yet or before
10.dv: from an unused root apparently meaning to interrupt or suspend;
from an unused root probably meaning to pierce or make fast;

11.gl: a stroke, literally or figuratively (in various applications, as follow)
11.kj: anvil, corner, foot(-step), going, (hundred-) fold, [idiom] now, (this) [phrase] once, order, rank, step, [phrase] thrice, (often-), second, this, two) time(-s), twice, wheel.

11.gl: blood (as that which when shed causes death) of man or an animal; by analogy, the juice of the grape; figuratively (especially in the plural) bloodshed (i.e. drops of blood)
probably to brighten up, i.e. (figuratively) be (causatively, make) blithe or gleesome
11.kj: cheer up, be (make) glad, (have, make) joy(-ful), be (make) merry, (cause to, make to) rejoice, [idiom] very.

11.gl: to gaze at; mentally to perceive, contemplate (with pleasure); specifically, to have avision of
morally wrong; concretely, an (actively) bad person
11.kj: [phrase] condemned, guilty, ungodly, wicked (man), that did wrong.

11.gl: to lave (the whole or a part of a thing)
